name: 700 Plus Credit
description_short: 700 Plus Credit offers credit repair, tradelines, and loan facilitation services. They claim to have helped thousands of clients since 2007 improve credit scores and secure financing.
description_long:
700 Plus Credit is a credit services company operating since 2007 that positions itself as a comprehensive financial solutions provider. The company's core mission emphasizes accessibility, using the tagline 'YES, YOU CAN' to appeal to consumers with credit challenges.

The company offers a diverse service portfolio spanning credit repair (disputing negative items), tradeline addition, credit monitoring, debt consolidation, and loan facilitation across multiple categories including mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and business loans. They also promote their mortgage and auto loan services, suggesting they work as intermediaries connecting clients with lenders. Their primary entry point is a free credit consultation.

What distinguishes 700 Plus Credit is their breadth of services—attempting to position themselves as a one-stop solution for credit problems and lending needs. They emphasize free initial consultations and claim to have served 'thousands' of clients. The company references specific staff members (notably Priscilla Martinez) in customer testimonials, suggesting a personalized service model.

However, several concerns merit consideration. The website contains heavily repetitive testimonials (identical reviews appear multiple times across different reviewer names and platforms), which raises authenticity questions. The company's claim to facilitate mortgages, auto loans, and business loans alongside credit repair suggests they may be an intermediary or broker rather than a direct lender or repair specialist. Pricing, specific dispute methodologies, and success rates are entirely absent from the website. The breadth of services (8+ different financial products) may indicate they are not specialized in any single area.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free credit consultations with specialists
Provides multiple services including credit repair, tradelines, and debt consolidation
Addresses credit repair, credit monitoring, and loan facilitation in one company
Website emphasizes personalized service and customer relationships
Google and Facebook reviews present positive customer feedback
cons: Testimonials are heavily duplicated/recycled across multiple reviewer names, suggesting low review authenticity
No pricing information disclosed for any services
No specific methodology explained for credit repair or dispute processes
Extremely broad service offering (8+ different financial products) suggests possible jack-of-all-trades, master-of-none positioning
No success rates, average credit score improvements, or measurable outcomes provided
best_for: Consumers seeking an initial free credit consultation to understand their repair options
Clients wanting multiple financial services (credit repair + loan facilitation) under one provider
Spanish-speaking consumers or those preferring personalized relationship-based service
diagnosis: 700 Plus Credit is best for consumers seeking an initial free consultation about credit repair combined with potential loan facilitation services. The main caveat is that the company's broad service offering, lack of specific pricing/methodology disclosure, and suspiciously duplicated testimonials suggest caution—research independent reviews and clarify specific repair strategies and costs before committing to paid services.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
